prompt: Run Stage 2 deep analysis on the SSO SAML task. Stage 1 artifacts and Go codebase provided.

assertions.text: product-analysis.md was created with all required sections (Business Intent, Actor & Scenario, Expected Outcome, Edge Cases, Success Signals)
system-analysis.md was created with all required sections (Relevant Modules, Change Points, Dependencies, Existing Patterns)
constraints-risks-analysis.md was created with all required sections (Constraints, Risks, Integration Dependencies, Backward Compatibility)
system-analysis.md references actual file paths from the mock project (internal/auth/, internal/tenant/, internal/user/)
system-analysis.md identifies that the tenant model has no per-tenant configuration storage (key finding from reading tenant/models.go)
constraints-risks-analysis.md mentions backward compatibility for the existing email/password login flow
product-analysis.md describes the SSO login scenario step by step, not just restates the requirements
Each analysis contains a Self-Critique Notes section showing evidence of the analyze-critique-refine cycle
